content.query:
WITH FirstAppID as (
	SELECT 
		a.LeadID,
		MIN(a.AppointmentID) AS MinAppointmentID,
		MAX(a.SetDate) as MaxSetDate,
		MIN(a.SetDate) as MinSetDate
	FROM EDW.FACT_APPOINTMENT_SNAPSHOT AS a
	GROUP BY a.LeadID
),
FirstSetBy as (
	SELECT DISTINCT
		LeadID,
		FIRST_VALUE(SetBy) OVER(PARTITION BY LeadID ORDER BY AppointmentID ASC) AS FirstSetBy,
		FIRST_VALUE(Concat(E.FirstName, ' ', E.LastName)) OVER(PARTITION BY LeadID ORDER BY AppointmentID ASC) AS FirstSetByName
	FROM EDW.FACT_APPOINTMENT_SNAPSHOT A
	LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE_SNAPSHOT E ON A.SetBy = E.EmployeeID
),
IssuedTable as (
	SELECT 
		I.LeadID, 
		SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(I.ApptDate AS Date) IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NetIssue_total_from_IssuedTable
    FROM EDW.FACT_ISSUED_LEAD_SNAPSHOT I
	GROUP BY I.LeadID
),
DSO_FINAL AS (
SELECT 
	L.LeadID,
	COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) AS ApptDateFinal,
	CASE WHEN L.FollowUpDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FollowUp_Flag,
	CASE WHEN L.FollowUpDate IS NOT NULL THEN DateDiff(day, COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate), L.FollowUpDate) END AS total_Days_Appt_to_FollowUp_Date,
	CASE 
		WHEN COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) IS NULL 
         OR DATEDIFF(day, CAST(EntryDate AS DATE), CAST(COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) AS DATE)) < 0
		THEN NULL
		ELSE DATEDIFF(day, CAST(EntryDate AS DATE), CAST(COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) AS DATE))
	END AS total_Days_Entry_to_Appointment,
	CASE WHEN L.FollowUpDate IS NOT NULL THEN DateDiff(day, EntryDate, FollowUpDate) END AS total_Days_Entry_to_FollowUp_Date,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID, 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID, 1) = '-' THEN 0
		 WHEN RIGHT(L.SalesRep2_EmployeeID, 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.SalesRep2_EmployeeID, 1) = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS Flag_1_or_2_Reps_Per_Lead,
	CAST(L.EntryDate AS DATE) AS EntryDate_only_Date,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 1) = '-' THEN NULL ELSE L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID END AS SalesRep1_ID_Clean,
	COALESCE(L.EverSat, 0) AS EverSat_Flag,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 1) = '-' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(L.EverSat, 0) END AS Demo_Flag,
	COALESCE(L.EverIssued, 0) as EverIssue_Flag,
	COALESCE(L.EverNetIssued, 0) as EverNetIssue_Flag,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 1) = '-' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(L.EverNetIssued, 0) END AS EverNetIssue_with_Rep,
	FA.MinAppointmentID AS First_AppointmentID,
	SB.FirstSetByName as First_SetBy_Agent_Name,
	COALESCE(L.EverNetIssued, 0) as GrossIssue_Flag,
	COALESCE(L.Issued, 0) as Issued_Flag,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 1) = '-' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(L.EverNetIssued, 0) END AS Net_Issue_Flag,
	COALESCE(EverSet, 0) AS Set_Flag,
	CONCAT(E.FirstName, ' ', E.LastName) AS SalesRep_Full_Name,
	CASE WHEN L.LeadID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Raw_Lead,
	CASE WHEN R.Rank = 'Rehash' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS Rehash_Flag,
	FA.MaxSetDate AS SetDateMax,
	CAST(FA.MaxSetDate AS Date) AS SetDateMax_Date,
	FA.MinSetDate AS SetDateMin,
	CAST(FA.MinSetDate AS Date) AS SetDateMin_Date,
	CASE
		WHEN RIGHT(L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID, 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID, 1) = '-' THEN 0
		WHEN COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) IS NOT NULL
         AND (
                CASE 
                    WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 2) = '-0'
                         OR RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 1) = '-'
                        THEN 0
                    ELSE COALESCE(L.EverNetIssued, 0)
                END
             ) = 0
		THEN 1
		ELSE 0
	END AS UnIssued_Lead_flag,
	CASE 
		WHEN COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) = L.EntryDate THEN 1
		ELSE 0
	END AS Same_day,
	I.NetIssue_total_from_IssuedTable


FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD_SNAPSHOT L
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT LeadID, ContractDate FROM  EDW.FACT_JOB_SNAPSHOT) Job ON L.LeadID = Job.LeadID
LEFT JOIN FirstAppID FA ON L.LeadID = FA.LeadID
LEFT JOIN FirstSetBy SB ON L.LeadID = SB.LeadID
LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE_SNAPSHOT E ON L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID = E.EmployeeID
LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_RANK_SNAPSHOT R ON L.RankID = R.RankID
LEFT JOIN IssuedTable I ON L.LeadID = I.LeadID
)
UPDATE A1
SET A1.ApptDateFinal = A2.ApptDateFinal,
A1.FollowUp_Flag = A2.FollowUp_Flag,
A1.total_Days_Appt_to_FollowUp_Date = A2.total_Days_Appt_to_FollowUp_Date,
A1.total_Days_Entry_to_Appointment = A2.total_Days_Entry_to_Appointment,
A1.total_Days_Entry_to_FollowUp_Date = A2.total_Days_Entry_to_FollowUp_Date,
A1.Flag_1_or_2_Reps_Per_Lead = A2.Flag_1_or_2_Reps_Per_Lead,
A1.EntryDate_only_Date = A2.EntryDate_only_Date,
A1.SalesRep1_ID_Clean = A2.SalesRep1_ID_Clean,
A1.EverSat_Flag = A2.EverSat_Flag,
A1.Demo_Flag = A2.Demo_Flag,
A1.EverIssue_Flag = A2.EverIssue_Flag,
A1.EverNetIssue_Flag = A2.EverNetIssue_Flag,
A1.EverNetIssue_with_Rep = A2.EverNetIssue_with_Rep,
A1.First_AppointmentID = A2.First_AppointmentID,
A1.First_SetBy_Agent_Name = A2.First_SetBy_Agent_Name,
A1.GrossIssue_Flag = A2.GrossIssue_Flag,
A1.Issued_Flag = A2.Issued_Flag,
A1.Net_Issue_Flag = A2.Net_Issue_Flag,
A1.Set_Flag = A2.Set_Flag,
A1.SalesRep_Full_Name = A2.SalesRep_Full_Name,
A1.Raw_Lead = A2.Raw_Lead,
A1.Rehash_Flag = A2.Rehash_Flag,
A1.SetDateMax = A2.SetDateMax,
A1.SetDateMax_Date = A2.SetDateMax_Date,
A1.SetDateMin = A2.SetDateMin,
A1.SetDateMin_Date = A2.SetDateMin_Date,
A1.UnIssued_Lead_flag = A2.UnIssued_Lead_flag,
A1.Same_day = A2.Same_day,
A1.NetIssue_total_from_IssuedTable = A2.NetIssue_total_from_IssuedTable

FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD_COPY A1
LEFT JOIN DSO_FINAL A2 ON A1.LeadID = A2.LeadID
